# viettelidc_ovpc_subnets (Data Source)

List all ViettelIDC subnets in a VPC.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `vpc_id` (String) VPC filter; falls back to provider default.

### Read-Only

- `subnets` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--subnets))

<a id="nestedatt--subnets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `subnets`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `is_public_zone` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `network_address` (String)
